name: rpid
note: Single source of truth for the template version. All template-system metadata lives in this .rpid/ directory: ownership.md (which files upgrade vs stay), CHANGELOG.md (template versions), migrations/ (per-version upgrade notes). A project instantiated from this template keeps `version` (the template version it is on) and `source` (the template's git URL); PROJECT_INIT writes them, UPGRADE_TEMPLATE bumps `version`.
